verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh mighty man of valour you faced your enemy. And with the sword you slaughtered You had sweet victory but it gets bitter When you are tried in the fire And it gets hard sometimes But pleasing to the soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Yet if you choose to leave your place Who will stand instead For this cause were you chosen To see that devil dead So keep on fighting Fighting with all the faith Keep looking towards the vision For the hour now is late

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So I'll put on the armor of God And I'll put on the shield of faith Trusting in the Sword of the Spirit Pray with sincerity and truth For we wrestle not against flesh and blood But principalities and powers And rulers of darkness And here I stand in truth Still tied to my Absolute

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've read in the Scripture in Joshua 5: 14 God came down as Lord of host Israel was defended and positioned And David slew the lion He looked at his experiences and then he smote Goliath

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I am of that pedigree Why should I cry and fear I'll speak God's word with revelation I will not surrender till I walk upon the ashes of the wicked one Till I stand face to face with the One who kept me by His grace.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We've read in the Scripture in Joshua 5: 14 God came down as Lord of host Israel was defended and positioned And David slew the lion He looked at his experiences and then he smote Goliath

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And we are of that pedigree Why should we cry and fear We'll speak God's Word with revelation We will not surrender Till we walk upon the ashes of the wicked one Till we stand face to face With the One who kept us by His grace.
